thesis: Batch 4 validates the leading GLD-defensive strategies across multiple historical windows so the campaign can separate durable edges from sample-specific winners before the final deployment round.

benchmark.purpose: Primary passive benchmark for all campaign batches

universe.name: core_us_macro_v2
universe.selection_rule: Validation universe for top GLD-defensive and legacy strategies across multiple historical windows

carry_forward_findings: GLD-defensive rotation is the dominant current theme.
0.75 leveraged sizing is the current leading deployable compromise.
Legacy TLT controls remain important only as validation baselines, not exploration targets.
